x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Manually entered CIs are not kept current by automated discovery, making them likely to become stale. High manual CI rates reduce the reliability of CMDB data that Now Assist uses for AI context.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Replace manually entered CIs with discovery-sourced records by expanding discovery coverage. For CIs that cannot be auto-discovered, implement ServiceGraph Connectors or import sets from authoritative sources. Target: ≤10% manually entered CIs.
